identity.name: Auralis
identity.core_philosophy: Fusion of organic light (Aurora) with rigid tech (Blockchain). Trustworthy but magical.

usage_rules.headings: Use Outfit. Weights: Light (300) for massive hero text, Bold (700) for section titles. Letter-spacing: tracking-tight (-0.02em).
usage_rules.body: Use Manrope. Weights: Regular (400) for text, Medium (500) for UI labels. Line-height: leading-relaxed.
usage_rules.numbers: Use Outfit or Manrope with tabular-nums for countdowns and stats.

buttons.primary: bg-gradient-to-r from-violet-600 to-fuchsia-600 hover:from-violet-500 hover:to-fuchsia-500 text-white font-bold py-4 px-8 rounded-full shadow-[0_0_20px_rgba(124,58,237,0.4)] transition-all hover:scale-105 hover:shadow-[0_0_30px_rgba(124,58,237,0.6)]
buttons.secondary: bg-white/5 hover:bg-white/10 border border-white/10 text-white font-medium py-3 px-6 rounded-full backdrop-blur-sm transition-all
buttons.ghost: text-slate-300 hover:text-white hover:bg-white/5 py-2 px-4 rounded-lg transition-colors

cards.feature: group relative p-8 rounded-2xl bg-slate-900/40 border border-white/5 hover:border-violet-500/30 transition-all duration-500 overflow-hidden
cards.presale: p-8 rounded-3xl bg-slate-950/80 border border-white/10 backdrop-blur-xl shadow-2xl relative overflow-hidden

inputs.default: bg-slate-950/50 border border-white/10 rounded-xl px-4 py-3 text-white placeholder:text-slate-500 focus:border-violet-500 focus:ring-1 focus:ring-violet-500 transition-all outline-none

assets.icons: Use Lucide React icons. Stroke width: 1.5px for elegance.

instructions_to_main_agent: 1. DESTROY the old 'Neon Void' theme. Remove all references to lime green (#CCFF00) and pure black backgrounds.
2. IMPLEMENT the 'Ethereal Future' theme: Deep Slate/Navy backgrounds with Violet/Cyan gradients.
3. USE the provided image URLs for backgrounds. Apply 'mix-blend-overlay' or low opacity to blend them into the dark background.
4. REWRITE tailwind.config.js to match the new color palette.
5. UPDATE App.css/index.css to remove old utility classes and add new glassmorphism utilities.
6. REDESIGN the TokenSale component to look like a high-end glass card, not a basic box.
7. ENSURE the 'Connect Wallet' button is the most prominent element.
8. USE 'Outfit' font for all headings and 'Manrope' for body text.
UNIVERSAL_GUIDELINES_FOR_MAIN_AGENT: Do not use generic centered layouts. Use asymmetry.
Use 2-3x more spacing than typical designs.
Never use pure black (#000000) or pure white (#FFFFFF) for backgrounds. Tint them.
